listYourProperty.bodyText: One listing goes live on the UAE's top portals simultaneously. No juggling multiple accounts: your dedicated agent does it all.
listYourProperty.feature1: Live on all portals within 24 hours
listYourProperty.feature3: One dedicated agent handles every enquiry
listYourProperty.feature4: Reach 2M+ active buyers and renters in the UAE
listYourProperty.feature5: Zero upfront fees, commission only on completion

valuation.heroSubtitle: An AI-powered estimate built from recent transactions, active listings, and comparable properties in your market.
valuation.wyg1Desc: Built from same-building sales, nearby comparables, and current asking prices.
valuation.wyg2Desc: See fair value, suggested list price, and quick-sale range in one snapshot.
valuation.wyg3Desc: Our valuation team reviews your report and reaches out with tailored advice.
valuation.formSubtitle: All the core details in one screen. The more precise, the tighter the estimate.
valuation.noMatch: No confident match yet. Keep typing or fill the fields below.
valuation.uploadDesc: PDF, PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF. We'll extract the property details automatically.
valuation.formDisclaimer: Views, upgrades, floor, vacancy, furnishings, and condition help refine the estimate.
valuation.reopeningReport: Reopening the saved report from the shareable link.
valuation.processingSubtitle: Key pricing guidance first, then comparable sales and market context.
valuation.demoResultDesc: this is simulated data from the deed upload. Use the search or fill the form for a live AI valuation.
valuation.fairValuePrepared: Comparable-backed fair value is prepared. Unlock the report to reveal the exact range and the reasoning behind it.
valuation.exactRangeUnlocks: Exact range unlocks with the full report.
valuation.comparableDesc: Strongest sales and active listings used in the estimate
valuation.movingFactorsDesc: Common reasons real-world pricing can shift
valuation.appraisalDesc: Our RERA-certified valuation experts provide a formal appraisal with an on-site inspection, suitable for selling, financing, or legal purposes.
valuation.unlockSubtitle: Unlock online. PDF delivered to your email or WhatsApp.
valuation.unlockDesc: Enter your name and at least one contact. We'll unlock the report instantly and send the same PDF to your email and/or WhatsApp.
valuation.pdfToEmail: PDF delivered to the email address you enter.
valuation.whatsappPdfDesc: If that number hasn't already messaged us on WhatsApp, we'll ask you to send a quick Hi first, then deliver the PDF automatically.

footer.tagline: Dubai's trusted real estate partner for buying, selling, and renting since 2010.
footer.taglineExtended: Binayah Real Estate, Dubai's trusted property partner. We connect clients with exceptional homes and investments.
footer.address: Business Bay, Marasi Drive, Dubai, UAE

about.heroSubtitle: For over 15 years, Binayah has matched clients with exceptional homes and high-yield investments across Dubai, powered by AI and guided by experts.
about.storyP1: Founded with a vision to redefine real estate in Dubai, Binayah Properties has grown from a boutique agency to one of the city's most respected property consultancies.
about.storyP2: We specialize in off-plan developments, luxury resale properties, property management, and investment advisory. Our team of multilingual experts understands the diverse needs of a global clientele.
about.storyP3: Today, we combine traditional real estate expertise with AI-driven market intelligence to deliver unparalleled service and results.
about.value1Desc: Every decision we make is guided by the best interests of our clients.
about.value2Desc: We believe in honest communication and full transparency in every transaction.
about.value3Desc: Deep knowledge of Dubai's real estate landscape across all segments.
about.value4Desc: Leveraging AI and cutting-edge technology to deliver smarter property solutions.
about.value5Desc: We uphold the highest ethical standards in every interaction.
about.value6Desc: Committed to delivering exceptional service at every touchpoint.

mortgageCalculator.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgageCalculator.label: Finance Tools
mortgageCalculator.subtitle: Estimate your monthly mortgage payments for Dubai properties
mortgageCalculator.disclaimer: * This calculator provides estimates only and does not constitute financial advice. Actual rates and terms may vary by bank. UAE Central Bank regulations require a minimum 20% down payment for expats (15% for UAE nationals) on properties under AED 5M.

roiCalculator.title: ROI Calculator
roiCalculator.label: Investment Tools
roiCalculator.subtitle: Estimate your rental yield, capital growth, and total return on Dubai property investments.
roiCalculator.footnoteLead: * Projections are estimates based on your inputs and do not constitute financial advice.
